title: fuddibacke SMP Modpack
description: Vanilla like Modpack with new Biomes, Building Blocks and Performance increasements mods. Made for fuddibacke SMP!
body:
# fuddibacke SMP Modpack
Welcome to the fuddibacke SMP Modpack!

The aim of the Modpack is to resemble mostly the vanilla game with some additional mods like: _Biomes O' Plenty_ for more biomes and blocks to build with and _Expanded Storage_ for larger storage chests to store more items without having too many chests around. Resource packs like _Fresh Animations_ are also available to make the game even more immersive!

This Modpack is aimed at anyone who want's to play vanilla in single player with a bit more added features, which are not out of place, and to correctly play on the fuddibacke SMP server.
